results.evidence: POST /api/connections/4c260e95-0aa9-46e2-9e59-d4fc7472f120/sync returned HTTP 200 with {data: {sync_id: 'sync_1773229285680', status: 'queued', message: 'Sync dispatched for oura connection'}}. DB shows sync_status='queued' after call. Inngest dev server was NOT running (confirmed via failed healthcheck on port 8288), proving the fire-and-forget resilience fix works. inngest.send() failure is caught and logged without propagating to the caller.
steps: Signed in as test@totus.dev via POST /api/auth/sign-in, obtained __session cookie
Verified Inngest dev server NOT running (curl http://localhost:8288/v0/health failed)
Reset connection sync_status to 'idle' via direct DB update
POST /api/connections/{id}/sync with session cookie -> HTTP 200, status: queued
Verified DB sync_status='queued' via psql query
Regression check: set sync_status='syncing', POST sync -> HTTP 409 CONFLICT (guard still works)
